items.name: Vegetable Spring Rolls
items.description: Crispy pastry rolls filled with cabbage, carrot, mushrooms, and glass noodles. Served with sweet chilli dip.

items.name: Salt & Chilli Chicken Bites
items.description: Crispy chicken pieces tossed with fresh chilli, garlic, spring onion, and peppers.

items.name: Beef Black Bean
items.description: Tender beef strips stir-fried with peppers, onions, and black bean garlic sauce. Served with steamed rice.

items.name: Thai Green Chicken Curry
items.description: Chicken breast simmered in coconut green curry with bamboo shoots, courgette, peppers, and basil.

items.name: Crispy Tofu Satay Bowl
items.description: Crispy tofu with jasmine rice, pickled vegetables, cucumber, and peanut satay sauce.

items.name: Classic Smash Burger
items.description: Two smashed beef patties with cheddar, pickles, lettuce, onion, house sauce, and toasted brioche bun.

items.name: Spicy Chicken Burger
items.description: Crispy buttermilk chicken with hot sauce mayo, lettuce, slaw, and jalapeños.

items.name: Skinny Fries
items.description: Crisp golden fries with sea salt.

items.name: Garlic Cheese Fries
items.description: Fries topped with garlic butter, melted cheddar, parsley, and house garlic sauce.

items.name: Egg Fried Rice
items.description: Wok-fried rice with egg, peas, carrots, spring onion, and light soy.

items.name: Sparkling Water 500ml
items.description: Chilled bottle of sparkling mineral water.
